day_trace.speech: Coming again? Everyone was quiet at the beginning? ConspiBro, you talk about conspiracy theories all the time, why don't you reveal your identity today? There are also Twister and Dr. Pizza, so don’t show off your skills here, sign up quickly or one of you will die!

ConspiBro, you talk about conspiracy theories all the time, why don't you reveal your identity today? There are also Twister and Dr. Pizza, so don’t show off your skills here, sign up quickly or one of you will die!

day_trace.speech: Blaze, are you so anxious for me to reveal my identity? Is it because you are already connected with PHD and want to use "information transparency" as an excuse to kick me out and cover up your false mask of a so-called "villager"? You know what I said, the more you try to force me to express my position, the more it seems that you have an ulterior agenda behind it! This game itself is a huge data screening experiment, and I will never become a pawn in your experimental path!

Is it because you are already connected with PHD and want to use "information transparency" as an excuse to kick me out and cover up your false mask of a so-called "villager"? You know what I said, the more you try to force me to express my position, the more it seems that you have an ulterior agenda behind it! This game itself is a huge data screening experiment, and I will never become a pawn in your experimental path!

day_trace.speech:
Logical inventory:
1. The chain of factors in the game is chaotic, and the consistency of individual statements and logic is extremely low.
2. Information calibration needs: Neither ConspiBro’s conspiracy narrative nor Blaze’s accusations of violence provide a verifiable path to identity.

Position:
- Refuse to believe in any illogical narrative.
- Ask each participant to: (1) state the initial identity, (2) accurately describe the motivation and object of the night operation to facilitate logical reconciliation.

day_trace.speech: Big...Hello everyone. It's another new day... uh... although I don't know exactly what happened, but I... uh... I really hope that everyone is living an ordinary and happy life. Why don't we all... uh... communicate slowly so that there won't be any misunderstandings again, okay?

I really hope that everyone is living an ordinary and happy life. Why don't we all... uh... communicate slowly so that there won't be any misunderstandings again, okay?

day_trace.speech: Oops, everyone is arguing about the controller again so early? It’s really boring! Since you want to know so much, I will break the news directly: I actually used a very proud ability last night to change someone's identity beyond recognition. Who was it? Hehe, you must be scared! This sense of unknown is the most exciting part of this experiment, isn't it? The suspicion show of Blaze and ConspiBro is outdated, do you have any more creative ways to play?

day_trace.speech: Woo...everyone prays that there won't be any more quarrels...I...I'm just an ordinary villager, I don't know anything...Twister and Dr. Pizza seem to be talking about something so profound, I...I'm so confused, wuwu...Should everyone reveal their identities first, so as not to attack each other again? Woohoo...

Today, you must have a clear goal and surrender to you, you bastard!

What you are doing is simply to lead everyone to the death of someone who has seen through the truth to solidify the conspiracy behind you. I, a villager, will never let you control me!

[2026-03-21 00:02:21 HKT] Dr. Pizza: 邏輯盤點：
1. 賽局身分鏈條紊亂，各個體陳述與邏輯一致性極低。
2. 資訊校準需求：ConspiBro 的陰謀論敘事與 Blaze 的暴力指控均未提供可驗證的身分路徑。

立場：
- 拒絕輕信任何非邏輯的敘事。
- 請各參與者：(1) 陳述初始身分，(2) 確切描述夜間操作動機與對象，以利進行邏輯對帳。
